zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Esico von Ballenstedt於大約1013年出生在德國薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格時，他的父親Adalbert Askanier Count of Ballenstedt19歲，母親Hidda-6歲。他和Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1059年在德國薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格巴倫斯泰特享年47歲，埋葬在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 拉文斯包格維音加特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Graf Esico von Ballenstedt于大约1013年出生在德国薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格时，他的父亲Adalbert Askanier Count of Ballenstedt19岁，母亲Hidda-6岁。他和Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1059年在德国薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格巴倫斯泰特享年47岁，埋葬在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 拉文斯包格維音加特。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Esico
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Gaetano, Digna, Julieta, Marco, Mariano, Raul, Vito.
Filipino: nickname or topographic name from a Hispanicized form of siko, a word which in various languages of the Philippines means ‘elbow’ or ‘turn’ and also denotes a sapodilla tree or fruit.

variants.name: Sica
meanings: ‘furrow’, personified as the goddess of agriculture and the harvest; the name of the wife of Rama, identified with the goddess Lakshmi, and a symbol of all the wifely virtues: purity, tenderness, and fidelity.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Esico von Ballenstedt was born about 1013, in Quedlinburg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, his father, Adalbert Askanier Count of Ballenstedt, was 19 and his mother, Hidda, was -6. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen. He died in 1059, in Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, at the age of 47, and was buried in Weingarten, Ravensburg, Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Esico von Ballenstedt est né environ 1013, à Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, son père, Adalbert Askanier Count of Ballenstedt, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Hidda, avait -6 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen. Il est décédé en 1059, à Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Weingarten, Oberamt Ravensburg, Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Graf Esico von Ballenstedt um 1013 in Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adalbert Askanier Count of Ballenstedt 19 und seine Mutter Hidda -6. Er hatte mit Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1059 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland und wurde in Weingarten, Oberamt Ravensburg, Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Esico von Ballenstedt è nato il circa 1013 nel Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania, il suo padre, Adalbert Askanier Count of Ballenstedt, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Hidda, aveva -6 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen. Morì nel 1059, nel Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Weingarten, Oberamt Ravensburg, Württemberg, Germania.

ja.Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt: ドイツサチセン-アンハルトクエドリンブルグボーレンステト
ja.lifeSummary: Graf Esico von Ballenstedtが約1013年にドイツサチセン-アンハルトクエドリンブルグで生まれた時，父Adalbert Askanier Count of Ballenstedtは19歳，母Hiddaは-6歳であった。彼はMathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringenとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1059年にドイツサチセン-アンハルトクエドリンブルグボーレンステトで47歳で死去し，ドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ラベンスブルグウエインガーテンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Esico von Ballenstedt(이)가 대략 1013년 독일 작센-아할트 크들린버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adalbert Askanier Count of Ballenstedt(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Hidda(은)는 -6세였다. 그는 Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1059년 독일 작센-아할트 크들린버그 바렌스테드트에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 레이븐스버그 위그가르텐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Esico von Ballenstedt nasceu aproximadamente 1013, em Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, seu pai, Adalbert Askanier Count of Ballenstedt, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Hidda, tinha -6 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen. Ele faleceu em 1059, em Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Weingarten, Oberamt Ravensburg, Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Esico von Ballenstedt родился около 1013 г. в местности куедлинбург, сачсен-анэлт, Германия, его отцу по имени Adalbert Askanier Count of Ballenstedt было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Hidda, -6. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen. Он умер в 1059 г. в местности балленстедт, куедлинбург, сачсен-анэлт, Германия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности вингартен, обирамт равенсбург, вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Graf Esico von Ballenstedt nació aproximadamente 1013, en Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania, su papá, Adalbert Askanier Count of Ballenstedt, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Hidda, tenía -6 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen. Murió en 1059, en Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Weingarten, Oberamt Ravensburg, Württemberg, Alemania.
